violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -In the walk in cooler container of raw chicken sitting on top of sauces also touching vegetables.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Several scoops in the cold holds down in the product with no handles.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Thawing shrimp in the food prep sink without the water running.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. -Employee with an open cup of tea in the kitchen.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Food on the floor of the walk in freezer. Walk in freezer has excessive ice buildup.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -In the walk in cooler containers of raw chicken and raw beef pushed together.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops in the cold holds with no handles.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood needs cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
